metaTitle: Bat Removal NYC | Humane Bat Exclusion | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Licensed bat exclusion and removal in NYC. Humane, legal, permanent. NYS DEC certified wildlife specialists. No bats harmed. Call now.
h1: Bat Removal in NYC — Legal, Humane, and Complete
heroParagraph: Bats are a protected species in New York — killing them is illegal, and exclusion must be done during specific seasons to avoid trapping maternity colonies. Our NYS DEC-licensed wildlife specialists use one-way exclusion devices and full structural sealing to remove bat colonies humanely and legally, then seal the property to prevent any return. If you've had a bat encounter indoors, contact us immediately — bat exposure requires medical evaluation.
